case_title: PEARL WONG ET AL VS. AMERICAN AIRLINES ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS - CSC LAWYERS INC.] SERVED MAY-19-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, PEARL WONG, CHARLES B. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES BRITISH AIRWAY TRAVELDNA,INC.DBA CHATDEAL.COM PLAINTIFFS SHALL TAKE NOTHING ON THEIR CLAIM. FROM THE EVIDENCE, IT APPEARS THAT DEFENDANTS REFUNDED THE AMOUNT PROVIDED BY THEIR RESPECTIVE TERM OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES SHALL PROVIDE PLAINTIFFS A LETTER ON CORPORATE LETTERHEAD EXPLAINING WHY FLIGHT 2614 FROM SFO TO ORD WAS CANCELED ON AUGUST 6, 2022. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF PEARL WONG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CHARLES WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SHELLI GIPSON (SR. LEGAL CLAIM) VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM. DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAY IS NOT PRESENT, SHELLI GIPSON ORALLY STATED SHE IS ASKED BY DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAY TO SPEAK FOR THEM FOR TODAY'S HEARING. DEFENDANT TRAVELDNA INC DBA CHATDEAL.COM IS NOT PRESENT. COURT ALLOWS AMERICAN AIRLINE APPEARANCE BY ZOOM FOR TODAY'S HEARING WITH NO OBJECTION BY THE PLAINTIFFS. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS AND DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES AND DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAY EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
